impact: Advances the PP&D guardrail plan by adding deterministic, source-backed FCC wireless workflow coverage without live DevHub automation, uploads, payments, submissions, or crawls.
summary: Add fixture-only FCC wireless application guardrail compiler tests for missing facts, document groups, and stop points.
target_task: Task checkbox-116: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for the FCC wireless application workflow covering missing facts, required document groups, payment stop points, correction-upload stop points, and any inspection/finalization stop points, using only fixture data.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
